Server\nAfter=network.target\n\n[Service]\nType=simple\nUser=mnemosyne\nGroup=mnemosyne\nWorkingDirectory=/opt/mnemosyne\nEnvironment=\"MNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH=/opt/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\"\nEnvironment=\"MNEMOSYNE_HOST=0.0.0.0\"\nEnvironment=\"MNEMOSYNE_PORT=8080\"\nEnvironment=\"MNEMOSYNE_API_KEY=your-secure-key\"\nExecStart=/opt/mnemosyne/venv/bin/python -m mnemosyne.server\nRestart=always\nRestartSec=5\n\n[Install]\nWantedBy=multi-user.target\n","language":"ini"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Setup"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Create user\nsudo useradd -r -s /bin/false mnemosyne\n\n# Create directories\nsudo mkdir -p /opt/mnemosyne/data\nsudo chown -R mnemosyne:mnemosyne /opt/mnemosyne\n\n# Install in virtualenv\nsudo -u mnemosyne bash -c '\ncd /opt/mnemosyne\npython3 -m venv venv\nvenv/bin/pip install mnemosyne\n'\n\n# Copy service file\nsudo cp mnemosyne.service /etc/systemd/system/\nsudo systemctl daemon-reload\nsudo
